description_long: This is a single mid-cut boot in a pastel pink color, featuring a robust and chunky white rubber sole with deep treads for traction. The upper is made of smooth leather with reinforced stitching along the seams and a padded white collar for added comfort around the ankle. There are six metallic eyelets on each side for lacing, but the laces are absent, leaving the tongue exposed. The lateral side displays a debossed Timberland tree logo, indicating the brand. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, light tan material for cushioning. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A pastel pink mid-cut boot with a chunky white sole, padded collar, and metallic eyelets, featuring a Timberland logo on the side. The shoe is sturdy, comfortable, and designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Timberland logo, six metallic eyelets, padded white collar, and smooth pink leather upper.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, exposed tongue, and absence of laces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible stitching, eyelets, and padded collar, but no logo.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar, heel seam, and the back of the sole.
attribute_logo: Debossed white tree logo on the lateral side near the heel.
attribute_lacing_style: no laces (eyelets present for standard criss-cross lacing)
